name: Treatstock
description: Treatstock 3D printing marketplace API for model upload, regional price comparison, material/color discovery, printable-pack configuration, and production ordering.

credential_fields.name: private_key
credential_fields.label: Private API Token
credential_fields.description: Treatstock private API token from the API partner settings. Do not use the restricted public-upload key for account, pricing, or order operations.

tools.name: create_printable_pack
tools.description: Create a printable pack by uploading one or more STL/PLY/3MF files or by giving public model URLs. Set a country or IP when prices are needed. Returned pack links are documented as valid for 24 hours.

files.description: Model files as runtime binary envelopes, base64 strings, data URLs, or raw strings.

filename.description: Filename used for one file; multiple files receive stable numbered names.

files-urls[].description: Publicly downloadable model URLs; emitted as repeated files-urls[] fields.

location[country].description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 destination country used for pricing.

location[ip].description: Destination IP alternative used by Treatstock for regional pricing.

tools.name: get_printable_pack
tools.description: Get uploaded-part ids, dimensions, quantities, scale unit, minimum PLA price, and processing state for a printable pack. If Treatstock reports not_calculated_yet, poll with bounded backoff.

packId.description: Printable pack id returned by create_printable_pack.

tools.name: update_printable_pack
tools.description: Change the pack scale unit and/or quantities before retrieving prices. qty is keyed by the part uid returned by get_printable_pack, for example {"MP:1815155": 7}.

qty.description: Map of Treatstock part uid to positive integer quantity.

tools.name: list_printing_options
tools.description: Compare provider prices and checkout URLs for a printable pack. A destination country/IP must have been supplied on upload or in this call. If calculation is pending, retry with bounded backoff.

tools.name: list_material_group_colors
tools.description: List Treatstock printer material-group and color codes accepted by pricing and ordering.

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Place a billable Treatstock production order using a providerId from list_printing_options. Verify the pack, provider, total, material/color, quantities, email, and shipping address before calling. If the response is ambiguous, inspect Treatstock before retrying.
